TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ngaluh, ngaloh . kagak kakuniza subal :Áúüś†łŚüü Eukaryota salaedan :ś§ćÁČ©ÁēĆ Plantae panan :śú®Ťė≠ś§ćÁČ©ťĖÄ Magnoliophyta upiz :śú®Ťė≠Á∂Ī Magnoliopsida mata :ŚĒáŚĹĘÁõģ Lamiales sapamat :ÁąĶŚļäÁßĎ Acanthaceae mikitinay :ÁõßŚą©ŤćČŚĪ¨ Ruellia hicahicaay :Ś°äś†ĻŤėÜŤéČŤćČ R. tuberosa u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika Ruellia tuberosa, also known as minnieroot, fever root, snapdragon root and sheep potato , is a species of flowering plant in the Acanthaceae family. Its native range is in Central America but presently it has become naturalized in many countries of tropical South and Southeast Asia. Some butterfly species, like the lemon pansy (Junonia lemonias) and the mangrove buckeye (Junonia genoveva), feed on the leaves of Ruellia tuberosa.
S.PHON: Ňčar~…ĺuńß, Ňčar~…ĺońß . kagak kakuniza subar~…ĺ :*** …ôukarjota sar~…ĺa…ôdan :*** pr~…ĺanta…ô panan :***** magnor~…ĺiopńßjta upiz :*** magnor~…ĺiopsida mata :*** r~…ĺamiar~…ĺ…ôs sapamat :*** a ¶antńßa ¶…ôa…ô mikitinaj :**** *u…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺia ńßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj :***** *. tub…ôrosa u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika *u…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺia tub…ôrosa, ar~…ĺso known as minni…ôroot, f…ô*…ôr root, snapdragon root and sńß…ô…ôp potato , is a sp…ô ¶i…ôs of fr~…ĺow…ôriŇč pr~…ĺant in tńß…ô a ¶antńßa ¶…ôa…ô famir~…ĺj. its nati*…ô raŇč…ô is in ¶…ôntrar~…ĺ am…ôri ¶a but pr…ôs…ôntr~…ĺj it ńßas b…ô ¶om…ô naturar~…ĺiz…ôd in manj ¶ountri…ôs of tropi ¶ar~…ĺ soutńß and soutńß…ôast asia. som…ô butt…ôrfr~…ĺj sp…ô ¶i…ôs, r~…ĺik…ô tńß…ô r~…ĺ…ômon pansj (*unonia r~…ĺ…ômonias) and tńß…ô maŇčro*…ô bu ¶k…ô…ô (*unonia g…ôno*…ô*a), f…ô…ôd on tńß…ô r~…ĺ…ôa*…ôs of *u…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺia tub…ôrosa.
S.FORM: ngaluh, ngaloh . kagak kakuniza subal :Áúüś†łŚüü Eukaryota salaedan :ś§ćÁČ©ÁēĆ Plantae panan :śú®Ťė≠ś§ćÁČ©ťĖÄ Magnoliophyta upiz :śú®Ťė≠Á∂Ī Magnoliopsida mata :ŚĒáŚĹĘÁõģ Lamiales sapamat :ÁąĶŚļäÁßĎ Acanthaceae mikitinay :ÁõßŚą©ŤćČŚĪ¨ Ruellia hicahicaay :Ś°äś†ĻŤėÜŤéČŤćČ R. tuberosa u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika Ruellia tuberosa, also known as minnieroot, fever root, snapdragon root and sheep potato , is a species of flowering plant in the Acanthaceae family. Its native range is in Central America but presently it has become naturalized in many countries of tropical South and Southeast Asia. Some butterfly species, like the lemon pansy (Junonia lemonias) and the mangrove buckeye (Junonia genoveva), feed on the leaves of Ruellia tuberosa.
S.PHON: Ňčar~…ĺuńß, Ňčar~…ĺońß . kagak kakuniza subar~…ĺ :*** …ôukarjota sar~…ĺa…ôdan :*** pr~…ĺanta…ô panan :***** magnor~…ĺiopńßjta upiz :*** magnor~…ĺiopsida mata :*** r~…ĺamiar~…ĺ…ôs sapamat :*** a ¶antńßa ¶…ôa…ô mikitinaj :**** *u…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺia ńßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj :***** *. tub…ôrosa u siwkaj nu nipar~…ĺuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…ĺuma mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sauŇčaj misapaju Ē~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu-ńßur~…ĺam atu amir~…ĺika *u…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺia tub…ôrosa, ar~…ĺso known as minni…ôroot, f…ô*…ôr root, snapdragon root and sńß…ô…ôp potato , is a sp…ô ¶i…ôs of fr~…ĺow…ôriŇč pr~…ĺant in tńß…ô a ¶antńßa ¶…ôa…ô famir~…ĺj. its nati*…ô raŇč…ô is in ¶…ôntrar~…ĺ am…ôri ¶a but pr…ôs…ôntr~…ĺj it ńßas b…ô ¶om…ô naturar~…ĺiz…ôd in manj ¶ountri…ôs of tropi ¶ar~…ĺ soutńß and soutńß…ôast asia. som…ô butt…ôrfr~…ĺj sp…ô ¶i…ôs, r~…ĺik…ô tńß…ô r~…ĺ…ômon pansj (*unonia r~…ĺ…ômonias) and tńß…ô maŇčro*…ô bu ¶k…ô…ô (*unonia g…ôno*…ô*a), f…ô…ôd on tńß…ô r~…ĺ…ôa*…ôs of *u…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺia tub…ôrosa.
